data.value: This JobAllocation has no products added.

data.value: JobAllocation List By Plant not Found

data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this JobAllocation?

data.name: AC_Msg_Body
data.value: It has been detected that there is already an Asychart incident with the same Plant, Area and Distribution information. What action do you want to take?

data.value: Canot Add This Distribution has exist

data.value: There are no guides at this time

data.value: The Department Code (Cost Center) is required!

data.name: HCEditMsg
data.value: It is required to select an element of the table before continuing with the edition.

data.name: HCFailUpload
data.value: Load error, the file could not be loaded to server, please communicate to your administrator this error.

data.name: HCGrupoError
data.value: The group to which it belongs is required!

data.name: HCIDSubAreaCompasError
data.value: The Sub area ID is required!

data.name: HCNameAreaCompas
data.value: Area to which it perts in compas

data.name: HCNameDepartamentoCompasError
data.value: The name of the department is required!

data.name: HCNameSubAreaCompasError
data.value: The name of Sub area is required!

data.name: HCRTOError
data.value: The user is required to operate, is it a required field?

data.name: HCSourceNull
data.value: Source Null, please communicate this error with your administrator.

data.name: HCTipoContratacionError
data.value: The type of hiring is requrid

data.name: HCValidationInt
data.value: The value must be an integer greater or equal to 0.

data.name: HCValidationString
data.value: The value of the field cannot be empty.

data.name: JOTmsgQuestionDelete
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this Job Observation Type?

data.name: Loading1
data.value: 🔍 Exploring the depths of the database.... Looking for plants to start our journey.

data.name: Loading10
data.value: Well and how was your day? ☀️

data.name: Loading11
data.value: ⏳ Patience is a virtue, and yours is about to be rewarded!!!Thanks for your understanding!

data.name: Loading2
data.value: 🚀 Browsing the areas in search of the distributions that will guide our way.

data.name: Loading3
data.value: 🔮 Rummaging through the database to unravel the secrets of the distributions and find the hidden products.

data.name: Loading4
data.value: Almost reached the end of the quest! 🕵️‍ Keep the excitement going as we get to the final details.

data.name: Loading5
data.value: 🤞 I swear this is almost over. The data is about to be unveiled.

data.name: Loading6
data.value: 🏁 Last steps, I promise! We will shortly present you with the data you've been waiting for.

data.name: Loading7
data.value: ⏳This shouldn't take too long. We're getting the data organized for you.

data.name: Loading8
data.value: ⏰ We're almost there, preparing the information in a way that's easy to understand.

data.name: Loading9
data.value: 🚀 We're nearing completion. The wait will be worth it when you see the full information.

data.name: msg1Language
data.value: Este cambio recargará la página, asegúrese de terminar su trabajo antes de hacer el cambio.

data.name: msg2Language
data.value: This change will reload the page, be sure to finish your work before making the change.

data.name: msgDeleteGroup
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this Group?

data.name: NoHCDataMsg
data.value: Please load a file before continuing.

data.name: ProductMsgDelete
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this Product?

data.name: question1Language
data.value: ¿Estas seguro de cambiar el idioma a

data.name: question2Language
data.value: Are you sure you want to change the language to

data.name: SDTmsgDelete
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this Document Type?

data.name: SOS_Body_AssignSV
data.value: By Distribution: Description: reassigns supervisors for all records within the same distribution. Usage: Useful when you want to group and reassign supervisors specifically within a category or grouping type defined in the table. All Records: Description: reassigns supervisors for all records in the table. Usage: Ideal when you need a global reassignment of supervisors across all records without distribution restrictions. By Operation: Description: Reassigns supervisors for all the records of a specific operation (a row). Usage: Useful to perform focused reassignments in a specific operation, allowing a detailed management of supervisors by operation.

data.name: UEPromoAssignMSG
data.value: Assign to another supervisor: If you choose this option, your current subordinates will be automatically reassigned to another user who will assume responsibility for supervising and working with them going forward. The reassignment will be done to ensure a smooth transition. If you have questions or would like to discuss alternatives, please contact us for assistance. We are here to facilitate the promotion process and ensure appropriate changes.

data.name: UEPromoMsg
data.value: Attention! Upon promotion, you will lose direct management of current subordinates. You have two options:

data.name: UEPromoNoAssignMSG
data.value: Continue unassigned: If you choose this option, you will lose your current subordinates, and they will not be reassigned to another supervisor. This will mean that you will no longer be in charge of their direct management.

data.name: UsersAllExampleFormat
data.value: Example of Use All Users Format

data.name: UsersBySuperior
data.value: This field is inherited by the supervisor

data.name: UsersDeleteQuestion
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this user?

data.value: Changes have been made in the areas you manage, which may affect subordinates. Continue?

data.value: First select the area / areas to manage

data.name: UsersMsg1
data.value: To modify this field, it is necessary to edit the corresponding field in the superior (manager).

data.value: Are you sure you want to delete the upper field?

data.value: this combination of floor plan and area does not have any distributions

data.value: These users tried to log in

data.value: This user has no subordinates yet.

data.value: This user has no superior yet.

data.name: UsersOPExampleFormat
data.value: Example of Use OP Users Format

data.name: UsersOpNoDistribution
data.value: This Operator has no distribution yet

data.name: UsersPlantNoAreas
data.value: This plant does not have areas to manage

data.name: UsersPlantNoOP
data.value: This plant / area does not have Operators

data.name: UsersPlantNoSSV
data.value: This plant does not have SSV

data.name: UsersPlantNoSV
data.value: This plant does not have Supervisors

data.name: UsersSSVExampleFormat
data.value: Example of Use SSV Users Format

data.name: UsersSV_Msg_Body
data.value:
This supervisor has changed his area of responsibility. You must decide to:
1-Migrate the subordinates to the supervisor's new area.
2-Reassign the subordinates to a new supervisor.
Please make a decision to maintain efficient management.

data.name: UsersSV_Msg_SupArea_Body
data.value:
A change has been made to this supervisor's superior and area. You must decide to:
1-Migrate the subordinates to the same area and/or group.
2-Reassign the subordinates to a new supervisor.
Please select the option you consider most appropriate to ensure a smooth transition.

data.name: UsersSV_Msg_SupArea_Title
data.value: Important! Change of supervisor's superior and area.

data.name: UsersSV_Msg_SupArea_Yes_Migrar
data.value: Migrate to same area and/or group.

data.name: UsersSV_Msg_Title
data.value: Important: Modification in managed area. Do you wish to continue?

data.name: Users_SubDistArea_Body
data.value:
There has been a change in the supervisor and the supervisor's areas. It is important to note that one or more subordinates have different areas than the supervisor.
Please review this information before proceeding.

data.name: youDontHaveAnyNoficationsYet
data.value: You don't have any notifications yet
